data.name: Analyzes sleep duration and consistency. Tracks your average sleep time and bedtime stability over the past 30 days.
data.value: Menganalisis durasi tidur dan konsistensi. Melacak rata-rata waktu tidur dan stabilitas waktu tidur Anda selama 30 hari terakhir.

data.name: How consistent your bedtime is. Higher is more stable.
data.value: Seberapa konsisten waktu tidur Anda. Semakin tinggi, semakin stabil.

data.name: Which event type records your sleep? (e.g. 'Sleep')
data.value: Jenis event apa yang merekam tidur Anda? (mis. 'Tidur')

data.name: Which field records the sleep duration? (Timespan type recommended)
data.value: Kolom mana yang mencatat durasi tidur? (Direkomendasikan tipe Timespan)

data.name: Your average daily sleep duration over the past 30 days.
data.value: Durasi tidur harian rata-rata Anda dalam 30 hari terakhir.
